channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead fox, 10th March
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: These bins are filthy, never cleaned, one is covered with grafffiti. They smell foul and need a thorough clean or better still they should be replaced., 10th March
item.description:
They are at the entrance to Dulwich Park by the Court Lane gates and are very off putting when you arrive at the park. They are emptied regularly but the actual bins are in a very bad state and have been for many months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carriage Drive, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned untaxed vehicle., 10th March
item.description:
The vehicle is situated on the service road adjacent to the Fair Acres estate, just near Amrita Hall. It is untaxed and has no MOT. It has been here for a few weeks now. Taking up a valuable parking space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Fair Acres, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded zigzag road markings, 10th March
item.description:
Zig zags outside school gates very faded. Drivers already don’t heed them. There’s an urgent need to repaint these road markings to reinforce safe driving and ensure safety of children attending school.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Highcombe, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on elcot avenue, 10th March
item.description:
Lots of items dumped outside the tire fitters on elcot avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall - willowbrook road, 10th March
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Willowbrook Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet more flytipping, 10th March
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a couple of chest of drawers. This is becoming a weekly occurrence.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car without reg plates Dursley Road, 10th March
item.description:
This car has been here for a while and doesn’t have reg plates in front or back

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolacombe Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th March
item.description:
Personable rubbish dumped by residents of 50 Kingsland High Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stanborough Passage, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very dangerous potholes around manhole, 10th March
item.description:
Extremely dangerous potholes needs immediate attention. This will cause an accident as people are braking suddenly and or swerving after leaving the roundabout
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackwall Lane, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parkside avenue/Thames roundabout Ballard missing, 10th March
item.description:
The traffic island is missing a traffic warning Ballard, on Saturday 07/03, a highway maintenance van stopped at the island then drove off and did not attempt to replace the faulty Ballard, this Ballard need to replace and secure. Also the metal rails around the roundabout requires to be replaced
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On the corner of gravel hill and Bloomfield road, 10th March
item.description:
The road surface near this junction requires attention and to be repaired as soon to avoid a damage to vehicles which can be expensive.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halcot Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash on the other side)-Flytipping, 10th March
item.description:
Flytipped chair needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (next to car wash)-Flytipping, 10th March
item.description:
The black chair that was over by the wall of Joe the Juice has been moved next to the car wash. It needs to be removed completely as rubbish is already accumulating.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove Along Wall of Joe the Juice shop (opposite the car wash)-Flytipping, 10th March
item.description:
Shopping basket flytipped. Needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside26 jeffreys st nw1, 10th March
item.description:
A new Street lights have been put in our streets the one outside 26 Jeffrey’s st has stopped working a month ago it’s only been put in two months ago. It’s very dark and dangerous in that part of the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Jeffrey's Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover damage surround, 10th March
item.description:
Manhole cover surrounds need filling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensway, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge sofa, 10th March
item.description:
Huge sofas an chairs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Appleby Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bike by the side of the path, 10th March
item.description:
Flytipped bike by the side of the path. At 51.378, 0.067 according to image metadata, which is more accurate than the position on the map, which does not show the footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramley Close, Locksbottom, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 10th March
item.description:
Lots of rubbish and not enough bins. Reported by Liberal Democrat Stockwell team.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Lorn Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
